title: Firebreak
tmdbOverview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Firebreak is a thriller and drama film from Spain. It has a 5.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
